description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
What's Changed
- Move experimentInfo into a useContext thing by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/630
- Make exporter jobs execute as tasks by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/637
- Add login flow by @dadmobile in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/530
- Fix going to step 2 for recipes by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/641
- Send adaptor names when running a model with adaptor by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/644
- Change GetFullPath to getAPIFullPath throughout the codebase by @Sourenm in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/646
- Display sweep config by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/605
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.20.0...v0.20.1
